text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the end of our time at the summer
camp.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Man, time sure flies. It feels like we just got here
yesterday.
choice_data_list: That means you got a lot out of it.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Then I guess this summer camp was totally worth
it.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And it'll be time for the Kikuka Sho race before
we know it. I gotta keep up the momentum after
we get back!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
There's no time to waste for you either! I need
your full cooperation!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Here we come! The Kikuka Sho won't know what
hit it!
